revision.text:
{{Sakujo/本体|2015年9月14日|但馬国の式内社記事}} {{Copyright}} {{神社 |名称 = 戸神社 |画像 = [[File:Konojinja935.jpg|thumb|戸神社拝殿・本殿]] |所在地 = [[兵庫県]][[豊岡市]][[日高町]]山宮409-3 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|28|21.36|N|134|43|0.93|E|region:JP-28_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |主祭神 = [[オホベヒメノミコト|大戸比売命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]（（名神大）[[名神大社|名神大]]）
旧[[村社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = [[春日造]]柿葺 ||例祭 = [[10月21日]] |神事 = 新嘗祭[[11月23日]]通称亥の子祭り }} [[File:Konojinja940.jpg|thumb|戸神社鳥居・社号標]] '''戸神社'''（とのじんじゃ）は、兵庫県豊岡市日高町にある神社。式内社（名神大社）、旧社格は村社、神饌幣帛料供進指定神社 == 概要 == 但馬国の名神大社十社中の一社に数えられた古社。御祭神の大戸比賣命は、またの名を奥津比売神と申し、竃を司る神である。戸神社の読み方として『国司文書　但馬神社系譜伝』には、戸ノ神社トノカミヤシロと戸ノ神社ヘノカミヤシロの2つが併記されている。戸の村鎮座とある。古くは止美（トベ）と書いた。止美が今は十戸と書いて「じゅうご」と読むようになったと思われる。 == 祭神 == [[オホベヒメノミコト|大戸比売命]] 『国司文書・但馬神社系譜伝』には、止美連の祖、将軍田道公命 == 歴史 == 『続日本後紀』承和9年10月乙亥（15日）条（842） 但馬国気多郡山神。雷神。戸神。蜀椒神。城埼郡海神等五前。並預二官社一。 『日本三代実録』貞観10年12月27日丙戌条（868） 授二但馬国従五位上出石神。粟鹿神並正五位下。従五位下山神。戸神。雷神。[木蜀]椒神。海神並従五位上一。 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 == 但馬国官幣社について == 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 名神祭二百八十五座。粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 『国司文書　但馬神社系譜伝』 人皇41代持統天皇の巳丑（みうし）3年（690）秋7月、 多遅麻少穀　忍海部（おしぬみべ）の広足これを祀る。 『国司文書　但馬故事記』（第一巻　気多郡故事記） 人皇31代敏達天皇十三年春3月、 止美連吉雄をもって、多遅麻国造となす。 吉雄は、その祖　大荒田別命の子　多奇波世君の弟・田道公を多他村に祀り、止美神社と称えまつる。また多他毘売命を多他丘に祀り、太多神社と称えまつる。 田道公の子孫は田道村に在り、田道公を斎き祀る。これ田道に坐（いま）す一宮神社これなり。 == 摂末社 == 厳島神社・名草神社 == 祭事 == == 現地情報 == ; 交通アクセス ''バス'' * [[江原駅]]（JR西日本山陰本線）から、イナカーバス神鍋高原行石井下車、約20分、徒歩1分 ''車'' * 国道312号線祢布交差点から国道482号線を西へ約6km、約9分 ; 周辺 * ; 関連項目 *[[但馬国の式内社一覧]] == 外部リンク == *[http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322256.html]（兵庫県神社庁） *[http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/380301.html]（國學院大學21世紀COEプログラム　神社史料集成） {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とのじんじゃ}} [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国|社]] [[Category:気多郡 (兵庫県)]]

revision.comment: 外部リンク兵庫県神社庁、所在地、座標、修正
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 戸神社 |画像 = [[File:Konojinja935.jpg|thumb|戸神社拝殿・本殿]] |所在地 = [[兵庫県]][[豊岡市]][[日高町]]十戸18番地1 |ISO =JP-28 | 緯度度 = 35 | 緯度分 = 28 | 緯度秒 = 38.5 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 134 |経度分 = 42 | 経度秒 = 36.5 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E |主祭神 = [[オホベヒメノミコト|大戸比売命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]（（名神大）[[名神大社|名神大]]）
旧[[村社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = [[春日造]]柿葺 ||例祭 = [[10月21日]] |神事 = 新嘗祭[[11月23日]]通称亥の子祭り }} [[File:Konojinja940.jpg|thumb|戸神社鳥居・社号標]] '''戸神社'''（とのじんじゃ）は、兵庫県豊岡市日高町にある神社。式内社（名神大社）、旧社格は村社、神饌幣帛料供進指定神社 == 概要 == 但馬国の名神大社十社中の一社に数えられた古社。御祭神の大戸比賣命は、またの名を奥津比売神と申し、竃を司る神である。戸神社の読み方として『国司文書　但馬神社系譜伝』には、戸ノ神社トノカミヤシロと戸ノ神社ヘノカミヤシロの2つが併記されている。戸の村鎮座とある。古くは止美（トベ）と書いた。止美が今は十戸と書いて「じゅうご」と読むようになったと思われる。 == 祭神 == [[オホベヒメノミコト|大戸比売命]] 『国司文書・但馬神社系譜伝』には、止美連の祖、将軍田道公命 == 歴史 == 『続日本後紀』承和9年10月乙亥（15日）条（842） 但馬国気多郡山神。雷神。戸神。蜀椒神。城埼郡海神等五前。並預二官社一。 『日本三代実録』貞観10年12月27日丙戌条（868） 授二但馬国従五位上出石神。粟鹿神並正五位下。従五位下山神。戸神。雷神。[木蜀]椒神。海神並従五位上一。 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 == 但馬国官幣社について == 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 名神祭二百八十五座。粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 『国司文書　但馬神社系譜伝』 人皇41代持統天皇の巳丑（みうし）3年（690）秋7月、 多遅麻少穀　忍海部（おしぬみべ）の広足これを祀る。 『国司文書　但馬故事記』（第一巻　気多郡故事記） 人皇31代敏達天皇十三年春3月、 止美連吉雄をもって、多遅麻国造となす。 吉雄は、その祖　大荒田別命の子　多奇波世君の弟・田道公を多他村に祀り、止美神社と称えまつる。また多他毘売命を多他丘に祀り、太多神社と称えまつる。 田道公の子孫は田道村に在り、田道公を斎き祀る。これ田道に坐（いま）す一宮神社これなり。 == 摂末社 == 厳島神社・名草神社 == 祭事 == == 現地情報 == ; 交通アクセス ''バス'' * [[江原駅]]（JR西日本山陰本線）から、イナカーバス神鍋高原行石井下車、約20分、徒歩1分 ''車'' * 国道312号線祢布交差点から国道482号線を西へ約6km、約9分 == 関連項目 == *[[但馬国の式内社一覧]] == 外部リンク == *[http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html 戸神社]（兵庫県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とのじんじゃ}} [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]]

旧[[村社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = [[春日造]]柿葺 |例祭 = [[10月21日]] |神事 = 新嘗祭[[11月23日]]通称亥の子祭り |地図 = Japan Hyogo}} [[File:Konojinja940.jpg|thumb|戸神社鳥居・社号標]] '''戸神社'''（とのじんじゃ）は、[[兵庫県]][[豊岡市]]にある神社。[[式内社]]（[[名神大社]]）、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]、神饌幣帛料供進指定神社。 == 概要 == 但馬国の名神大社十社中の一社に数えられた古社。御祭神の大戸比賣命は、またの名を奥津比売神と申し、竃を司る神である。戸神社の読み方として『国司文書　但馬神社系譜伝』には、戸ノ神社トノカミヤシロと戸ノ神社ヘノカミヤシロの2つが併記されている。戸の村鎮座とある。古くは止美（トベ）と書いた。止美が今は十戸と書いて「じゅうご」と読むようになったと思われる。 == 祭神 == [[オホベヒメノミコト|大戸比売命]] 『国司文書・但馬神社系譜伝』には、止美連の祖、将軍田道公命 == 歴史 == 『続日本後紀』承和9年10月乙亥（15日）条（842） 但馬国気多郡山神。雷神。戸神。蜀椒神。城埼郡海神等五前。並預二官社一。 『日本三代実録』貞観10年12月27日丙戌条（868） 授二但馬国従五位上出石神。粟鹿神並正五位下。従五位下山神。戸神。雷神。[木蜀]椒神。海神並従五位上一。 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 == 但馬国官幣社について == 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 名神祭二百八十五座。粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 『国司文書　但馬神社系譜伝』 人皇41代持統天皇の己丑（きうし）3年（690）秋7月、 多遅麻少穀　忍海部（おしぬみべ）の広足これを祀る。 『国司文書　但馬故事記』（第一巻　気多郡故事記） 人皇31代敏達天皇十三年春3月、 止美連吉雄をもって、多遅麻国造となす。 吉雄は、その祖　大荒田別命の子　多奇波世君の弟・田道公を多他村に祀り、止美神社と称えまつる。また多他毘売命を多他丘に祀り、太多神社と称えまつる。 田道公の子孫は田道村に在り、田道公を斎き祀る。これ田道に坐（いま）す一宮神社これなり。 == 摂末社 == 厳島神社・名草神社 == 祭事 == == 現地情報 == ; 交通アクセス ''バス'' * [[江原駅]]（JR西日本山陰本線）から、イナカーバス神鍋高原行石井下車、約20分、徒歩1分 ''車'' * 国道312号線祢布交差点から国道482号線を西へ約6km、約9分 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === 参照 === {{Reflist|2}} == 関連項目 == *[[但馬国の式内社一覧]] == 外部リンク == *[http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html 戸神社]（兵庫県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とのじんじゃ}} [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]]

拝殿・本殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=14|frame-align=center|frame-width=270|coord={{coord2|35|28|38.5|N|134|42|36.5|E}}}} |所在地 = [[兵庫県]][[豊岡市]]日高町十戸18番地1 |ISO =JP-28 | 緯度度 = 35 | 緯度分 = 28 | 緯度秒 = 38.5 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 134 |経度分 = 42 | 経度秒 = 36.5 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E |祭神 = [[オホベヒメノミコト|大戸比売命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]（[[名神大社|名神大]]）
旧[[村社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = [[春日造]]柿葺 |例祭 = [[10月21日]] |神事 = 新嘗祭[[11月23日]]通称亥の子祭り |地図 = Japan Hyogo#Japan }} [[File:Konojinja940.jpg|thumb|戸神社鳥居・社号標]] '''戸神社'''（とのじんじゃ）は、[[兵庫県]][[豊岡市]]にある神社。[[式内社]]（[[名神大社]]）、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]、神饌幣帛料供進指定神社。 == 概要 == 但馬国の名神大社十社中の一社に数えられた古社。御祭神の大戸比賣命は、またの名を奥津比売神とも称し、竃を司る神である。 == 祭神 == *[[大戸比売命]] == 歴史 == 『続日本後紀』承和9年10月乙亥（15日）条（842） 但馬国気多郡山神。雷神。戸神。蜀椒神。城埼郡海神等五前。並預二官社一。 『日本三代実録』貞観10年12月27日丙戌条（868） 授二但馬国従五位上出石神。粟鹿神並正五位下。従五位下山神。戸神。雷神。[木蜀]椒神。海神並従五位上一。 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 == 但馬国官幣社について == 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 名神祭二百八十五座。粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 『国司文書　但馬神社系譜伝』 人皇41代持統天皇の己丑（きうし）3年（690）秋7月、 多遅麻少穀　忍海部（おしぬみべ）の広足これを祀る。 『国司文書　但馬故事記』（第一巻　気多郡故事記） 人皇31代敏達天皇十三年春3月、 止美連吉雄をもって、多遅麻国造となす。 吉雄は、その祖　大荒田別命の子　多奇波世君の弟・田道公を多他村に祀り、止美神社と称えまつる。また多他毘売命を多他丘に祀り、太多神社と称えまつる。 田道公の子孫は田道村に在り、田道公を斎き祀る。これ田道に坐（いま）す一宮神社これなり。 == 摂末社 == 厳島神社・名草神社 == 祭事 == == 現地情報 == ; 交通アクセス ''バス'' * [[江原駅]]（JR西日本山陰本線）から、イナカーバス神鍋高原行石井下車、約20分、徒歩1分 ''車'' * 国道312号線祢布交差点から国道482号線を西へ約6km、約9分 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === 出典 === {{Reflist|2}} == 関連項目 == * [[但馬国の式内社一覧]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html 戸神社]（兵庫県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とのじんじゃ}} [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]]

{{nihongo|'''Tono Shrine'''|戸神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|de|Shintō-Schrein|zh|神社|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|ru|Дзиндзя|WD=Q845945}}

{{nihongo|'''Tono Shrine'''|戸神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tono Shrine'''|戸神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tono Shrine'''|戸神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tono Shrine'''|戸神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tono Shrine'''|戸神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tono Shrine'''|戸神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tono Shrine'''|戸神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]].

revision.comment: 29 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 戸神社 |画像 = [[File:Konojinja935.jpg|270px]]
拝殿・本殿 |所在地 = [[兵庫県]][[豊岡市]]日高町十戸18番地1 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[オホベヒメノミコト|大戸比売命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]（[[名神大社|名神大]]）
旧[[村社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = [[春日造]]柿葺 |例祭 = [[10月21日]] |神事 = 新嘗祭[[11月23日]]通称亥の子祭り |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Hyogo|label=絹巻神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[File:Konojinja940.jpg|thumb|戸神社鳥居・社号標]] '''戸神社'''（とのじんじゃ）は、[[兵庫県]][[豊岡市]]にある神社。[[式内社]]（[[名神大社]]）、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]、神饌幣帛料供進指定神社。 == 概要 == 但馬国の名神大社十社中の一社に数えられた古社。御祭神の大戸比賣命は、またの名を奥津比売神とも称し、竃を司る神である。 == 祭神 == *[[大戸比売命]] == 歴史 == 『続日本後紀』承和9年10月乙亥（15日）条（842） 但馬国気多郡山神。雷神。戸神。蜀椒神。城埼郡海神等五前。並預二官社一。 『日本三代実録』貞観10年12月27日丙戌条（868） 授二但馬国従五位上出石神。粟鹿神並正五位下。従五位下山神。戸神。雷神。[木蜀]椒神。海神並従五位上一。 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 == 但馬国官幣社について == 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 名神祭二百八十五座。粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 == 摂末社 == 厳島神社・名草神社 == 祭事 == == 現地情報 == ; 交通アクセス ''バス'' * [[江原駅]]（JR西日本山陰本線）から、イナカーバス神鍋高原行石井下車、約20分、徒歩1分 ''車'' * 国道312号線祢布交差点から国道482号線を西へ約6km、約9分 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === 出典 === {{Reflist|2}} == 関連項目 == * [[但馬国の式内社一覧]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html 戸神社]（兵庫県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とのじんじゃ}} [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]]

[[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|戸神社|version=107337675|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 戸神社 |画像 = [[File:Konojinja935.jpg|270px]]
拝殿・本殿 |所在地 = [[兵庫県]][[豊岡市]]日高町十戸18番地1 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[オホベヒメノミコト|大戸比売命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]（[[名神大社|名神大]]）
旧[[村社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = [[春日造]]柿葺 |例祭 = [[10月21日]] |神事 = 新嘗祭[[11月23日]]通称亥の子祭り |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Hyogo|label=絹巻神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[File:Konojinja940.jpg|thumb|戸神社鳥居・社号標]] '''戸神社'''（とのじんじゃ）は、[[兵庫県]][[豊岡市]]にある神社。[[式内社]]（[[名神大社]]）、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]、神饌幣帛料供進指定神社。 == 概要 == 但馬国の名神大社十社中の一社に数えられた古社。御祭神の大戸比賣命は、またの名を奥津比売神とも称し、竃を司る神である。 == 祭神 == *[[大戸比売命]] == 歴史 == 『続日本後紀』承和9年10月乙亥（15日）条（842） 但馬国気多郡山神。雷神。戸神。蜀椒神。城埼郡海神等五前。並預二官社一。 『日本三代実録』貞観10年12月27日丙戌条（868） 授二但馬国従五位上出石神。粟鹿神並正五位下。従五位下山神。戸神。雷神。[木蜀]椒神。海神並従五位上一。 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 == 但馬国官幣社について == 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 名神祭二百八十五座。粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 == 摂末社 == 厳島神社・名草神社 == 祭事 == == 現地情報 == ; 交通アクセス ''バス'' * [[江原駅]]（JR西日本山陰本線）から、イナカーバス神鍋高原行石井下車、約20分、徒歩1分 ''車'' * 国道312号線祢布交差点から国道482号線を西へ約6km、約9分 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === 出典 === {{Reflist|2}} == 関連項目 == * [[但馬国の式内社一覧]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html 戸神社]（兵庫県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とのじんじゃ}} [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]] ==End Japanese==

[[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|戸神社|version=107337675|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 戸神社 |画像 = [[File:Konojinja935.jpg|270px]]
拝殿・本殿 |所在地 = [[兵庫県]][[豊岡市]]日高町十戸18番地1 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[オホベヒメノミコト|大戸比売命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]（[[名神大社|名神大]]）
旧[[村社]] |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = [[春日造]]柿葺 |例祭 = [[10月21日]] |神事 = 新嘗祭[[11月23日]]通称亥の子祭り |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Hyogo|label=絹巻神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[File:Konojinja940.jpg|thumb|戸神社鳥居・社号標]] '''戸神社'''（とのじんじゃ）は、[[兵庫県]][[豊岡市]]にある神社。[[式内社]]（[[名神大社]]）、旧[[社格]]は[[村社]]、神饌幣帛料供進指定神社。 == 概要 == 但馬国の名神大社十社中の一社に数えられた古社。御祭神の大戸比賣命は、またの名を奥津比売神とも称し、竃を司る神である。 == 祭神 == *[[大戸比売命]] == 歴史 == 『続日本後紀』承和9年10月乙亥（15日）条（842） 但馬国気多郡山神。雷神。戸神。蜀椒神。城埼郡海神等五前。並預二官社一。 『日本三代実録』貞観10年12月27日丙戌条（868） 授二但馬国従五位上出石神。粟鹿神並正五位下。従五位下山神。戸神。雷神。[木蜀]椒神。海神並従五位上一。 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 == 但馬国官幣社について == 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 名神祭二百八十五座。粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 == 摂末社 == 厳島神社・名草神社 == 祭事 == == 現地情報 == ; 交通アクセス ''バス'' * [[江原駅]]（JR西日本山陰本線）から、イナカーバス神鍋高原行石井下車、約20分、徒歩1分 ''車'' * 国道312号線祢布交差点から国道482号線を西へ約6km、約9分 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === 出典 === {{Reflist|2}} == 関連項目 == * [[但馬国の式内社一覧]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html 戸神社]（兵庫県神社庁） {{神道 横}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]]

[[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[JA:戸神社]] {{wikidata link|Q21655262}} [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] {{translated page|ja|戸神社|version=107337675|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 戸神社 |画像 = [[File:Konojinja935.jpg|270px]]
拝殿・本殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|兵庫県|Q130290}}{{jalink|豊岡市|Q696388}}日高町十戸18番地1 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|オホベヒメノミコト||大戸比売命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）
旧{{jalink|村社}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = {{jalink|春日造|Q3193781}}柿葺 |例祭 = {{jalink|10月21日|Q2960}} |神事 = 新嘗祭{{jalink|11月23日|Q3021}}通称亥の子祭り |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Hyogo|label=絹巻神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[File:Konojinja940.jpg|thumb|戸神社鳥居・社号標]] '''戸神社'''（とのじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|兵庫県|Q130290}}{{jalink|豊岡市|Q696388}}にある神社。{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）、旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|村社}}、神饌幣帛料供進指定神社。 == 概要 == 但馬国の名神大社十社中の一社に数えられた古社。御祭神の大戸比賣命は、またの名を奥津比売神とも称し、竃を司る神である。 == 祭神 == *{{jalink|大戸比売命}} == 歴史 == 『続日本後紀』承和9年10月乙亥（15日）条（842） 但馬国気多郡山神。雷神。戸神。蜀椒神。城埼郡海神等五前。並預二官社一。 『日本三代実録』貞観10年12月27日丙戌条（868） 授二但馬国従五位上出石神。粟鹿神並正五位下。従五位下山神。戸神。雷神。[木蜀]椒神。海神並従五位上一。 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 == 但馬国官幣社について == 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 名神祭二百八十五座。粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 == 摂末社 == 厳島神社・名草神社 == 祭事 == == 現地情報 == ; 交通アクセス ''バス'' * {{jalink|江原駅|Q871691}}（JR西日本山陰本線）から、イナカーバス神鍋高原行石井下車、約20分、徒歩1分 ''車'' * 国道312号線祢布交差点から国道482号線を西へ約6km、約9分 == 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === 出典 === {{Reflist|2}} == 関連項目 == * {{jalink|但馬国の式内社一覧|Q11381626}} == 外部リンク == * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html 戸神社]（兵庫県神社庁） {{神道 横}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]]

旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = {{jalink|春日造|Q3193781}}柿葺 |例祭 = {{jalink|10月21日|Q2960}} |神事 = 新嘗祭{{jalink|11月23日|Q3021}}通称亥の子祭り |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Hyogo|label=絹巻神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[File:Konojinja940.jpg|thumb|戸神社鳥居・社号標]] '''戸神社'''（とのじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|兵庫県|Q130290}}{{jalink|豊岡市|Q696388}}にある神社。{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）、旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}、神饌幣帛料供進指定神社。 === 概要 === 但馬国の名神大社十社中の一社に数えられた古社。御祭神の大戸比賣命は、またの名を奥津比売神とも称し、竃を司る神である。 === 祭神 === *{{jalink|大戸比売命}} === 歴史 === 『続日本後紀』承和9年10月乙亥（15日）条（842） 但馬国気多郡山神。雷神。戸神。蜀椒神。城埼郡海神等五前。並預二官社一。 『日本三代実録』貞観10年12月27日丙戌条（868） 授二但馬国従五位上出石神。粟鹿神並正五位下。従五位下山神。戸神。雷神。[木蜀]椒神。海神並従五位上一。 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 === 但馬国官幣社について === 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 名神祭二百八十五座。粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 === 摂末社 === 厳島神社・名草神社 === 祭事 === === 現地情報 === ; 交通アクセス ''バス'' * {{jalink|江原駅|Q871691}}（JR西日本山陰本線）から、イナカーバス神鍋高原行石井下車、約20分、徒歩1分 ''車'' * 国道312号線祢布交差点から国道482号線を西へ約6km、約9分 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === 出典 === {{Reflist|2}} === 関連項目 === * {{jalink|但馬国の式内社一覧|Q11381626}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html 戸神社]（兵庫県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とのじんじゃ}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]]

{{Expand Japanese|戸神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Tono Shrine | native_name = 戸神社 | image = Konojinja935.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Tono Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.477257|134.710169}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Tono Shrine'''|戸神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tajima Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो Taisha|ja|名神大社|simple|Myōjin Taisha|zh|名神大社|WD=Q9610964}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|WD=Q135160342}} * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|WD=Q135026601}} == part of (P361) == == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q696388|lt=Q696388|WD=Q696388}} * {{ill|Q1053727|lt=Q1053727|WD=Q1053727}} * {{ill|Keta district|lt=Keta district|ja|気多郡 (兵庫県)|zh|氣多郡 (兵庫縣)|WD=Q21655271}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.477257|134.710169}} == image (P18) == * Konojinja935.jpg == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|WD=Q135037878}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20140103234910/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp/db/jinja/380302.html == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 182682 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|lt=Q135159299|WD=Q135159299}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|WD=Q3029647}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11071125|lt=Q11071125|WD=Q11071125}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|lt=Q17|WD=Q17}} == name in kana (P1814) == * とのじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 2140005012454 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '兵庫県豊岡市日高町十戸18番地1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:戸神社]] {{wikidata link|Q21655262}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = 戸神社 |画像 = [[File:Konojinja935.jpg|270px]]
拝殿・本殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|兵庫県|Q130290}}{{jalink|豊岡市|Q696388}}日高町十戸18番地1 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|オホベヒメノミコト||大戸比売命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = {{jalink|春日造|Q3193781}}柿葺 |例祭 = {{jalink|10月21日|Q2960}} |神事 = 新嘗祭{{jalink|11月23日|Q3021}}通称亥の子祭り |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Hyogo|label=絹巻神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[File:Konojinja940.jpg|thumb|戸神社鳥居・社号標]] '''戸神社'''（とのじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|兵庫県|Q130290}}{{jalink|豊岡市|Q696388}}にある神社。{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）、旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}、神饌幣帛料供進指定神社。 === 概要 === 但馬国の名神大社十社中の一社に数えられた古社。御祭神の大戸比賣命は、またの名を奥津比売神とも称し、竃を司る神である。 === 祭神 === *{{jalink|大戸比売命}} === 歴史 === 『続日本後紀』承和9年10月乙亥（15日）条（842） 但馬国気多郡山神。雷神。戸神。蜀椒神。城埼郡海神等五前。並預二官社一。 『日本三代実録』貞観10年12月27日丙戌条（868） 授二但馬国従五位上出石神。粟鹿神並正五位下。従五位下山神。戸神。雷神。[木蜀]椒神。海神並従五位上一。 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 === 但馬国官幣社について === 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 名神祭二百八十五座。粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 === 摂末社 === 厳島神社・名草神社 === 祭事 === === 現地情報 === ; 交通アクセス ''バス'' * {{jalink|江原駅|Q871691}}（JR西日本山陰本線）から、イナカーバス神鍋高原行石井下車、約20分、徒歩1分 ''車'' * 国道312号線祢布交差点から国道482号線を西へ約6km、約9分 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === 出典 === {{Reflist|2}} === 関連項目 === * {{jalink|但馬国の式内社一覧|Q11381626}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html 戸神社]（兵庫県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とのじんじゃ}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tono Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

拝殿・本殿 |所在地 = {{jalink|兵庫県|Q130290}}{{jalink|豊岡市|Q696388}}日高町十戸18番地1 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|オホベヒメノミコト||大戸比売命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964|名神大}}）
旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = {{jalink|春日造|Q3193781}}柿葺 |例祭 = {{jalink|10月21日|Q2960}} |神事 = 新嘗祭{{jalink|11月23日|Q3021}}通称亥の子祭り |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Hyogo|label=絹巻神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[File:Konojinja940.jpg|thumb|戸神社鳥居・社号標]] '''戸神社'''（とのじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|兵庫県|Q130290}}{{jalink|豊岡市|Q696388}}にある神社。{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）、旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}、神饌幣帛料供進指定神社。 === 概要 === 但馬国の名神大社十社中の一社に数えられた古社。御祭神の大戸比賣命は、またの名を奥津比売神とも称し、竃を司る神である。 === 祭神 === *{{jalink|大戸比売命}} === 歴史 === 『続日本後紀』承和9年10月乙亥（15日）条（842） 但馬国気多郡山神。雷神。戸神。蜀椒神。城埼郡海神等五前。並預二官社一。 『日本三代実録』貞観10年12月27日丙戌条（868） 授二但馬国従五位上出石神。粟鹿神並正五位下。従五位下山神。戸神。雷神。[木蜀]椒神。海神並従五位上一。 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 === 但馬国官幣社について === 『延喜式』3（臨時祭）・名神祭条〔28〕 名神祭二百八十五座。粟鹿神社一座。夜夫神社二座。伊豆志神社八座。 山神社一座。戸神社一座。雷神社一座。 [木蜀]椒神社一座。海神社一座。已上但馬国。 === 摂末社 === 厳島神社・名草神社 === 祭事 === === 現地情報 === ; 交通アクセス ''バス'' * {{jalink|江原駅|Q871691}}（JR西日本山陰本線）から、イナカーバス神鍋高原行石井下車、約20分、徒歩1分 ''車'' * 国道312号線祢布交差点から国道482号線を西へ約6km、約9分 === 脚注 === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === 注釈 === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === 出典 === {{Reflist|2}} === 関連項目 === * {{jalink|但馬国の式内社一覧|Q11381626}} === 外部リンク === * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html 戸神社]（兵庫県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とのじんじゃ}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tono Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

It is located in [[Tajima Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 2140005012454 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '兵庫県豊岡市日高町十戸18番地1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:戸神社]] {{wikidata link|Q21655262}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tono Shrine |画像 = [[File:Konojinja935.jpg|270px]]
Haiden and honden |所在地 = {{jalink|Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290}}{{jalink|Toyooka|Q696388}}Hidaka-chō Tono 18-1 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Ohobehime-no-Mikoto||Ōtohime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|myōjin taisha|Q9610964|major myōjin shrine}})
former {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = {{jalink|kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781}} kakibuki |例祭 = {{jalink|October 21|Q2960}} |神事 = Niiname festival on {{jalink|November 23|Q3021}}, commonly called Inoko Festival |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Hyogo|label=Kinumaki Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[File:Konojinja940.jpg|thumb|To Shrine torii and shrine name marker]] '''Tono Shrine''' (とのじんじゃ) is a shrine in {{jalink|Toyooka|Q696388}}, {{jalink|Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|myōjin taisha|Q9610964}}), its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}}, and it is a designated shrine for offerings of sacred food and silk. === Overview === An ancient shrine counted as one of the ten myōjin taisha in Tajima Province. Its enshrined deity Ōtohime-no-Mikoto is also called Okutsu-hime-no-Kami, a deity governing hearths. === Enshrined deity === *{{jalink|Ōtohime-no-Mikoto}} === History === "Shoku Nihon Kōki," Jōwa 9, 10th month, day 15 (842) In Tajima Province, five deities of Keta District and Kinosaki District - Yama deity, Thunder deity, To deity, [木蜀]椒 deity, and Sea deity - were all entered among official shrines. "Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku," Jōgan 10, 12th month, day 27 (868) Bestowed ranks: In Tajima Province, Izushi and Awaga deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Lower; Yama, To, Thunder, [木蜀]椒, and Sea deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Upper. "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === About official shrines of Tajima Province === "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Myōjin festival, 285 seats. Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === Sessha and massha === Itsukushima Shrine and Nagusa Shrine === Festivals === === Local information === ; Transportation ''Bus'' * From {{jalink|Ebara Station|Q871691}} (JR West San'in Main Line), take Ina-car bus for Kannabe Kōgen, get off at Ishii, about 20 min, then 1 min on foot ''Car'' * About 9 minutes / approx. 6 km west on National Route 482 from Nifu intersection on Route 312 === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === Annotations === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === References === {{Reflist|2}} === See also === * {{jalink|List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province|Q11381626}} === External links === * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html Tono Shrine] (Hyogo Prefectural Shrine Association) {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とのじんじゃ}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tono Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 2140005012454 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '兵庫県豊岡市日高町十戸18番地1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:戸神社]] {{wikidata link|Q21655262}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Tono Shrine |画像 = [[File:Konojinja935.jpg|270px]]
Haiden and honden |所在地 = {{jalink|Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290}}{{jalink|Toyooka|Q696388}}Hidaka-chō Tono 18-1 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|Ohobehime-no-Mikoto||Ōtohime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|myōjin taisha|Q9610964|major myōjin shrine}})
former {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = {{jalink|kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781}} kakibuki |例祭 = {{jalink|October 21|Q2960}} |神事 = Niiname festival on {{jalink|November 23|Q3021}}, commonly called Inoko Festival |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Hyogo|label=Kinumaki Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[File:Konojinja940.jpg|thumb|To Shrine torii and shrine name marker]] '''Tono Shrine''' (とのじんじゃ) is a shrine in {{jalink|Toyooka|Q696388}}, {{jalink|Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|myōjin taisha|Q9610964}}), its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}}, and it is a designated shrine for offerings of sacred food and silk. === Overview === An ancient shrine counted as one of the ten myōjin taisha in Tajima Province. Its enshrined deity Ōtohime-no-Mikoto is also called Okutsu-hime-no-Kami, a deity governing hearths. === Enshrined deity === *{{jalink|Ōtohime-no-Mikoto}} === History === "Shoku Nihon Kōki," Jōwa 9, 10th month, day 15 (842) In Tajima Province, five deities of Keta District and Kinosaki District - Yama deity, Thunder deity, To deity, [木蜀]椒 deity, and Sea deity - were all entered among official shrines. "Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku," Jōgan 10, 12th month, day 27 (868) Bestowed ranks: In Tajima Province, Izushi and Awaga deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Lower; Yama, To, Thunder, [木蜀]椒, and Sea deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Upper. "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === About official shrines of Tajima Province === "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Myōjin festival, 285 seats. Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === Sessha and massha === Itsukushima Shrine and Nagusa Shrine === Festivals === === Local information === ; Transportation ''Bus'' * From {{jalink|Ebara Station|Q871691}} (JR West San'in Main Line), take Ina-car bus for Kannabe Kōgen, get off at Ishii, about 20 min, then 1 min on foot ''Car'' * About 9 minutes / approx. 6 km west on National Route 482 from Nifu intersection on Route 312 === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === Annotations === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === References === {{Reflist|2}} === See also === * {{jalink|List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province|Q11381626}} === External links === * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html Tono Shrine] (Hyogo Prefectural Shrine Association) {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とのじんじゃ}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tono Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Its enshrined deity Ōtohime-no-Mikoto is also called Okutsu-hime-no-Kami, a deity governing hearths. === Enshrined deity === *{{jalink|Ōtohime-no-Mikoto}} === History === "Shoku Nihon Kōki," Jōwa 9, 10th month, day 15 (842) In Tajima Province, five deities of Keta District and Kinosaki District - Yama deity, Thunder deity, To deity, [木蜀]椒 deity, and Sea deity - were all entered among official shrines. "Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku," Jōgan 10, 12th month, day 27 (868) Bestowed ranks: In Tajima Province, Izushi and Awaga deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Lower; Yama, To, Thunder, [木蜀]椒, and Sea deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Upper. "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === About official shrines of Tajima Province === "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Myōjin festival, 285 seats. Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === Sessha and massha === Itsukushima Shrine and Nagusa Shrine === Festivals === === Local information === ; Transportation ''Bus'' * From {{jalink|Ebara Station|Q871691}} (JR West San'in Main Line), take Ina-car bus for Kannabe Kōgen, get off at Ishii, about 20 min, then 1 min on foot ''Car'' * About 9 minutes / approx. 6 km west on National Route 482 from Nifu intersection on Route 312 === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === Annotations === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === References === {{Reflist|2}} === See also === * {{jalink|List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province|Q11381626}} === External links === * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html Tono Shrine] (Hyogo Prefectural Shrine Association) {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とのじんじゃ}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tono Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]]

= Tono Shrine |画像 = [[File:Konojinja935.jpg|270px]]
Haiden and honden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290|WD=Q130290}}{{ill|lt=Toyooka|Q696388|WD=Q696388}}Hidaka-chō Tono 18-1 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ohobehime-no-Mikoto||WD=|lt=Ōtohime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=major myōjin shrine}})
former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781}} kakibuki |例祭 = {{ill|lt=October 21|Q2960|WD=Q2960}} |神事 = Niiname festival on {{ill|lt=November 23|Q3021|WD=Q3021}}, commonly called Inoko Festival |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Hyogo|label=Kinumaki Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[File:Konojinja940.jpg|thumb|To Shrine torii and shrine name marker]] '''Tono Shrine''' (とのじんじゃ) is a shrine in {{ill|lt=Toyooka|Q696388|WD=Q696388}}, {{ill|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290|WD=Q130290}}. It is a {{ill||lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964}}), its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}, and it is a designated shrine for offerings of sacred food and silk. === Overview === An ancient shrine counted as one of the ten myōjin taisha in Tajima Province. Its enshrined deity Ōtohime-no-Mikoto is also called Okutsu-hime-no-Kami, a deity governing hearths. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill||lt=Ōtohime-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}} === History === "Shoku Nihon Kōki," Jōwa 9, 10th month, day 15 (842) In Tajima Province, five deities of Keta District and Kinosaki District - Yama deity, Thunder deity, To deity, [木蜀]椒 deity, and Sea deity - were all entered among official shrines. "Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku," Jōgan 10, 12th month, day 27 (868) Bestowed ranks: In Tajima Province, Izushi and Awaga deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Lower; Yama, To, Thunder, [木蜀]椒, and Sea deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Upper. "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === About official shrines of Tajima Province === "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Myōjin festival, 285 seats. Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === Sessha and massha === Itsukushima Shrine and Nagusa Shrine === Festivals === === Local information === ; Transportation ''Bus'' * From {{ill|lt=Ebara Station|Q871691|WD=Q871691}} (JR West San'in Main Line), take Ina-car bus for Kannabe Kōgen, get off at Ishii, about 20 min, then 1 min on foot ''Car'' * About 9 minutes / approx. 6 km west on National Route 482 from Nifu intersection on Route 312 === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === Annotations === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === References === {{Reflist|2}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province|Q11381626|WD=Q11381626}} === External links === * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html Tono Shrine] (Hyogo Prefectural Shrine Association) {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とのじんじゃ}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tono Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

All above in Tajima Province. === Sessha and massha === Itsukushima Shrine and Nagusa Shrine === Festivals === === Local information === ; Transportation ''Bus'' * From {{ill|lt=Ebara Station|Q871691|WD=Q871691}} (JR West San'in Main Line), take Ina-car bus for Kannabe Kōgen, get off at Ishii, about 20 min, then 1 min on foot ''Car'' * About 9 minutes / approx. 6 km west on National Route 482 from Nifu intersection on Route 312 === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === Annotations === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === References === {{Reflist|2}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province|Q11381626|WD=Q11381626}} === External links === * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html Tono Shrine] (Hyogo Prefectural Shrine Association) {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とのじんじゃ}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tono Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964}}), its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}, and it is a designated shrine for offerings of sacred food and silk. === Overview === An ancient shrine counted as one of the ten myōjin taisha in Tajima Province. Its enshrined deity Ōtohime-no-Mikoto is also called Okutsu-hime-no-Kami, a deity governing hearths. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtohime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === History === "Shoku Nihon Kōki," Jōwa 9, 10th month, day 15 (842) In Tajima Province, five deities of Keta District and Kinosaki District - Yama deity, Thunder deity, To deity, [木蜀]椒 deity, and Sea deity - were all entered among official shrines. "Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku," Jōgan 10, 12th month, day 27 (868) Bestowed ranks: In Tajima Province, Izushi and Awaga deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Lower; Yama, To, Thunder, [木蜀]椒, and Sea deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Upper. "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === About official shrines of Tajima Province === "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Myōjin festival, 285 seats. Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === Sessha and massha === Itsukushima Shrine and Nagusa Shrine === Festivals === === Local information === ; Transportation ''Bus'' * From {{ill|lt=Ebara Station|Q871691|WD=Q871691}} (JR West San'in Main Line), take Ina-car bus for Kannabe Kōgen, get off at Ishii, about 20 min, then 1 min on foot ''Car'' * About 9 minutes / approx. 6 km west on National Route 482 from Nifu intersection on Route 312 === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === Annotations === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === References === {{Reflist|2}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province|Q11381626|WD=Q11381626}} === External links === * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html Tono Shrine] (Hyogo Prefectural Shrine Association) {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とのじんじゃ}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tono Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

= Tono Shrine |画像 = [[File:Konojinja935.jpg|270px]]
Haiden and honden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290|WD=Q130290}}{{ill|lt=Toyooka|Q696388|WD=Q696388}}Hidaka-chō Tono 18-1 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ohobehime-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtohime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=major myōjin shrine}})
former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781}} kakibuki |例祭 = {{ill|lt=October 21|Q2960|WD=Q2960}} |神事 = Niiname festival on {{ill|lt=November 23|Q3021|WD=Q3021}}, commonly called Inoko Festival |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Hyogo|label=Kinumaki Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[File:Konojinja940.jpg|thumb|To Shrine torii and shrine name marker]] '''Tono Shrine''' (とのじんじゃ) is a shrine in {{ill|lt=Toyooka|Q696388|WD=Q696388}}, {{ill|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290|WD=Q130290}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964}}), its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}, and it is a designated shrine for offerings of sacred food and silk. === Overview === An ancient shrine counted as one of the ten myōjin taisha in Tajima Province. Its enshrined deity Ōtohime-no-Mikoto is also called Okutsu-hime-no-Kami, a deity governing hearths. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtohime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === History === "Shoku Nihon Kōki," Jōwa 9, 10th month, day 15 (842) In Tajima Province, five deities of Keta District and Kinosaki District - Yama deity, Thunder deity, To deity, [木蜀]椒 deity, and Sea deity - were all entered among official shrines. "Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku," Jōgan 10, 12th month, day 27 (868) Bestowed ranks: In Tajima Province, Izushi and Awaga deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Lower; Yama, To, Thunder, [木蜀]椒, and Sea deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Upper. "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === About official shrines of Tajima Province === "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Myōjin festival, 285 seats. Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === Sessha and massha === Itsukushima Shrine and Nagusa Shrine === Festivals === === Local information === ; Transportation ''Bus'' * From {{ill|lt=Ebara Station|Q871691|WD=Q871691}} (JR West San'in Main Line), take Ina-car bus for Kannabe Kōgen, get off at Ishii, about 20 min, then 1 min on foot ''Car'' * About 9 minutes / approx. 6 km west on National Route 482 from Nifu intersection on Route 312 === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === Annotations === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === References === {{Reflist|2}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province|Q11381626|WD=Q11381626}} === External links === * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html Tono Shrine] (Hyogo Prefectural Shrine Association) {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とのじんじゃ}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tono Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and it is a designated shrine for offerings of sacred food and silk. === Overview === An ancient shrine counted as one of the ten myōjin taisha in Tajima Province. Its enshrined deity Ōtohime-no-Mikoto is also called Okutsu-hime-no-Kami, a deity governing hearths. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtohime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === History === "Shoku Nihon Kōki," Jōwa 9, 10th month, day 15 (842) In Tajima Province, five deities of Keta District and Kinosaki District - Yama deity, Thunder deity, To deity, [木蜀]椒 deity, and Sea deity - were all entered among official shrines. "Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku," Jōgan 10, 12th month, day 27 (868) Bestowed ranks: In Tajima Province, Izushi and Awaga deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Lower; Yama, To, Thunder, [木蜀]椒, and Sea deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Upper. "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === About official shrines of Tajima Province === "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Myōjin festival, 285 seats. Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === Sessha and massha === Itsukushima Shrine and Nagusa Shrine === Festivals === === Local information === ; Transportation ''Bus'' * From {{ill|lt=Ebara Station|Q871691|WD=Q871691|1=Ebara Station}} (JR West San'in Main Line), take Ina-car bus for Kannabe Kōgen, get off at Ishii, about 20 min, then 1 min on foot ''Car'' * About 9 minutes / approx. 6 km west on National Route 482 from Nifu intersection on Route 312 === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === Annotations === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === References === {{Reflist|2}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province|Q11381626|WD=Q11381626|1=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province}} === External links === * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html Tono Shrine] (Hyogo Prefectural Shrine Association) {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:とのじんじゃ}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tono Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

[[File:Konojinja935.jpg|270px]]
Haiden and honden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290|WD=Q130290|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Toyooka|Q696388|WD=Q696388|1=Toyooka, Hyōgo}}Hidaka-chō Tono 18-1 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ohobehime-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtohime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=major myōjin shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} kakibuki |例祭 = {{ill|lt=October 21|Q2960|WD=Q2960|1=October 21}} |神事 = Niiname festival on {{ill|lt=November 23|Q3021|WD=Q3021|1=November 23}}, commonly called Inoko Festival |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Hyogo|label=Kinumaki Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[File:Konojinja940.jpg|thumb|To Shrine torii and shrine name marker]] '''Tono Shrine''' (とのじんじゃ) is a shrine in {{ill|lt=Toyooka|Q696388|WD=Q696388|1=Toyooka, Hyōgo}}, {{ill|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290|WD=Q130290|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and it is a designated shrine for offerings of sacred food and silk. === Overview === An ancient shrine counted as one of the ten myōjin taisha in Tajima Province. Its enshrined deity Ōtohime-no-Mikoto is also called Okutsu-hime-no-Kami, a deity governing hearths. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtohime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === History === "Shoku Nihon Kōki," Jōwa 9, 10th month, day 15 (842) In Tajima Province, five deities of Keta District and Kinosaki District - Yama deity, Thunder deity, To deity, [木蜀]椒 deity, and Sea deity - were all entered among official shrines. "Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku," Jōgan 10, 12th month, day 27 (868) Bestowed ranks: In Tajima Province, Izushi and Awaga deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Lower; Yama, To, Thunder, [木蜀]椒, and Sea deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Upper. "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === About official shrines of Tajima Province === "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Myōjin festival, 285 seats. Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === Sessha and massha === Itsukushima Shrine and Nagusa Shrine === Festivals === === Local information === ; Transportation ''Bus'' * From {{ill|lt=Ebara Station|Q871691|WD=Q871691|1=Ebara Station}} (JR West San'in Main Line), take Ina-car bus for Kannabe Kōgen, get off at Ishii, about 20 min, then 1 min on foot ''Car'' * About 9 minutes / approx. 6 km west on National Route 482 from Nifu intersection on Route 312 === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === Annotations === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === References === {{Reflist|2}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province|Q11381626|WD=Q11381626|1=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province}} === External links === * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html Tono Shrine] (Hyogo Prefectural Shrine Association) {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tono Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:但馬国の式内社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]]

It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and it is a designated shrine for offerings of sacred food and silk. === Overview === An ancient shrine counted as one of the ten myōjin taisha in Tajima Province. Its enshrined deity Ōtohime-no-Mikoto is also called Okutsu-hime-no-Kami, a deity governing hearths. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtohime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === History === "Shoku Nihon Kōki," Jōwa 9, 10th month, day 15 (842) In Tajima Province, five deities of Keta District and Kinosaki District - Yama deity, Thunder deity, To deity, [木蜀]椒 deity, and Sea deity - were all entered among official shrines. "Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku," Jōgan 10, 12th month, day 27 (868) Bestowed ranks: In Tajima Province, Izushi and Awaga deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Lower; Yama, To, Thunder, [木蜀]椒, and Sea deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Upper. "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === About official shrines of Tajima Province === "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Myōjin festival, 285 seats. Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === Sessha and massha === Itsukushima Shrine and Nagusa Shrine === Festivals === === Local information === ; Transportation ''Bus'' * From {{ill|lt=Ebara Station|Q871691|WD=Q871691|1=Ebara Station}} (JR West San'in Main Line), take Ina-car bus for Kannabe Kōgen, get off at Ishii, about 20 min, then 1 min on foot ''Car'' * About 9 minutes / approx. 6 km west on National Route 482 from Nifu intersection on Route 312 === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === Annotations === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === References === {{Reflist|2}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province|Q11381626|WD=Q11381626|1=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province}} === External links === * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html Tono Shrine] (Hyogo Prefectural Shrine Association) {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tono Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:兵庫県の神社]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:名神大社|名とのじんじゃ]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:兵庫県の旧村社]]

It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and it is a designated shrine for offerings of sacred food and silk. === Overview === An ancient shrine counted as one of the ten myōjin taisha in Tajima Province. Its enshrined deity Ōtohime-no-Mikoto is also called Okutsu-hime-no-Kami, a deity governing hearths. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtohime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === History === "Shoku Nihon Kōki," Jōwa 9, 10th month, day 15 (842) In Tajima Province, five deities of Keta District and Kinosaki District - Yama deity, Thunder deity, To deity, [木蜀]椒 deity, and Sea deity - were all entered among official shrines. "Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku," Jōgan 10, 12th month, day 27 (868) Bestowed ranks: In Tajima Province, Izushi and Awaga deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Lower; Yama, To, Thunder, [木蜀]椒, and Sea deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Upper. "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === About official shrines of Tajima Province === "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Myōjin festival, 285 seats. Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === Sessha and massha === Itsukushima Shrine and Nagusa Shrine === Festivals === === Local information === ; Transportation ''Bus'' * From {{ill|lt=Ebara Station|Q871691|WD=Q871691|1=Ebara Station}} (JR West San'in Main Line), take Ina-car bus for Kannabe Kōgen, get off at Ishii, about 20 min, then 1 min on foot ''Car'' * About 9 minutes / approx. 6 km west on National Route 482 from Nifu intersection on Route 312 === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === Annotations === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === References === {{Reflist|2}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province|Q11381626|WD=Q11381626|1=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province}} === External links === * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html Tono Shrine] (Hyogo Prefectural Shrine Association) {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tono Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Category:豊岡市の建築物]] [[Category:豊岡市の歴史]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Hyōgo Prefecture]]

[[File:Konojinja935.jpg|270px]]
Haiden and honden |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290|WD=Q130290|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Toyooka|Q696388|WD=Q696388|1=Toyooka, Hyōgo}}Hidaka-chō Tono 18-1 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Ohobehime-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtohime-no-Mikoto}} |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|lt=major myōjin shrine|1=Myōjin Taisha}})
former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} kakibuki |例祭 = {{ill|lt=October 21|Q2960|WD=Q2960|1=October 21}} |神事 = Niiname festival on {{ill|lt=November 23|Q3021|WD=Q3021|1=November 23}}, commonly called Inoko Festival |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Hyogo|label=Kinumaki Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[File:Konojinja940.jpg|thumb|To Shrine torii and shrine name marker]] '''Tono Shrine''' (とのじんじゃ) is a shrine in {{ill|lt=Toyooka|Q696388|WD=Q696388|1=Toyooka, Hyōgo}}, {{ill|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290|WD=Q130290|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and it is a designated shrine for offerings of sacred food and silk. === Overview === An ancient shrine counted as one of the ten myōjin taisha in Tajima Province. Its enshrined deity Ōtohime-no-Mikoto is also called Okutsu-hime-no-Kami, a deity governing hearths. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtohime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === History === "Shoku Nihon Kōki," Jōwa 9, 10th month, day 15 (842) In Tajima Province, five deities of Keta District and Kinosaki District - Yama deity, Thunder deity, To deity, [木蜀]椒 deity, and Sea deity - were all entered among official shrines. "Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku," Jōgan 10, 12th month, day 27 (868) Bestowed ranks: In Tajima Province, Izushi and Awaga deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Lower; Yama, To, Thunder, [木蜀]椒, and Sea deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Upper. "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === About official shrines of Tajima Province === "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Myōjin festival, 285 seats. Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === Sessha and massha === Itsukushima Shrine and Nagusa Shrine === Festivals === === Local information === ; Transportation ''Bus'' * From {{ill|lt=Ebara Station|Q871691|WD=Q871691|1=Ebara Station}} (JR West San'in Main Line), take Ina-car bus for Kannabe Kōgen, get off at Ishii, about 20 min, then 1 min on foot ''Car'' * About 9 minutes / approx. 6 km west on National Route 482 from Nifu intersection on Route 312 === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === Annotations === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === References === {{Reflist|2}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province|Q11381626|WD=Q11381626|1=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province}} === External links === * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html Tono Shrine] (Hyogo Prefectural Shrine Association) {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tono Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings in Toyooka City]] [[Category:History of Toyooka]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Hyōgo Prefecture]]

former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = Unknown |本殿 = {{ill|lt=kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} kakibuki |例祭 = {{ill|lt=October 21|Q2960|WD=Q2960|1=October 21}} |神事 = Niiname festival on {{ill|lt=November 23|Q3021|WD=Q3021|1=November 23}}, commonly called Inoko Festival |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Hyogo|label=Kinumaki Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[File:Konojinja940.jpg|thumb|To Shrine torii and shrine name marker]] '''Tono Shrine''' (とのじんじゃ) is a shrine in {{ill|lt=Toyooka|Q696388|WD=Q696388|1=Toyooka, Hyōgo}}, {{ill|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290|WD=Q130290|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and it is a designated shrine for offerings of sacred food and silk. === Overview === An ancient shrine counted as one of the ten myōjin taisha in Tajima Province. Its enshrined deity Ōtohime-no-Mikoto is also called Okutsu-hime-no-Kami, a deity governing hearths. === Enshrined deity === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōtohime-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === History === "Shoku Nihon Kōki," Jōwa 9, 10th month, day 15 (842) In Tajima Province, five deities of Keta District and Kinosaki District - Yama deity, Thunder deity, To deity, [木蜀]椒 deity, and Sea deity - were all entered among official shrines. "Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku," Jōgan 10, 12th month, day 27 (868) Bestowed ranks: In Tajima Province, Izushi and Awaga deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Lower; Yama, To, Thunder, [木蜀]椒, and Sea deities were given Senior Fifth Rank Upper. "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === About official shrines of Tajima Province === "Engishiki" 3 (Rinji-sai), myōjin festival article [28] Myōjin festival, 285 seats. Awaga Shrine one seat. Yabu Shrine two seats. Izushi Shrine eight seats. Yama Shrine one seat. To Shrine one seat. Thunder Shrine one seat. [木蜀]椒 Shrine one seat. Sea Shrine one seat. All above in Tajima Province. === Sessha and massha === Itsukushima Shrine and Nagusa Shrine === Festivals === === Local information === ; Transportation ''Bus'' * From {{ill|lt=Ebara Station|Q871691|WD=Q871691|1=Ebara Station}} (JR West San'in Main Line), take Ina-car bus for Kannabe Kōgen, get off at Ishii, about 20 min, then 1 min on foot ''Car'' * About 9 minutes / approx. 6 km west on National Route 482 from Nifu intersection on Route 312 === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === Annotations === {{Reflist|group="注釈"}} === References === {{Reflist|2}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province|Q11381626|WD=Q11381626|1=List of Shikinaisha in Tajima Province}} === External links === * [http://www.hyogo-jinjacho.com/data/6322255.html Tono Shrine] (Hyogo Prefectural Shrine Association) {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Tono Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Tono Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Hiteisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Toyooka City]] [[Category:History of Toyooka]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tajima Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Hyōgo Prefecture]]
